[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001111 5
1 11011010 5
2 11001111 6
3 11001011 5
4 11010111 6
5 11111100 6
6 01110111 6
7 10111101 6

12 21 11111100 6 match 5
